column1: りんごやバナナを買いました。
column2: りんごやばななをかいました。
column3: I bought apples, bananas, and so on.
column6: や: partial listing — X や Y (etc.) = X and Y and other similar things
column8: と = full list; や = examples among others

column1: 机の上に本やペンがあります。
column2: つくえのうえにほんやぺんがあります。
column3: There are books, pens, and other things on the desk.
column6: や vs と: completeness — や = there are more items; と = this is the complete list
column8: と = full list; や = examples among others
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:や source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:standard

column2: いぬやねこがすきです。
column3: I like dogs, cats, and that kind of thing.
column6: 〜や〜など: listing with etc. — や and など together signal partial list
column8: と = full list; や = examples among others
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:や source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column1: 東京や大阪に行ったことがあります。
column2: とうきょうやおおさかにいったことがあります。
column3: I've been to Tokyo, Osaka, and other places.
column6: や: non-exhaustive conjunction — selects examples from a larger set
column8: と = full list; や = examples among others
column10: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:や source:authored frequency:top10k complexity:standard

column1: 朝はパンや卵を食べます。
column2: あさはぱんやたまごをたべます。
column3: In the morning I eat bread, eggs, and the like.
column6: や: informal register — casual spoken listing particle
column8: と = full list; や = examples among others
